title: Week of April 6, 2026
summary: This week focused on platform stability improvements that ensure OpsPal runs smoothly behind the scenes. The most significant enhancement prevents invisible field additions in Salesforce when Dynamic Forms is active, protecting your page layouts from unexpected changes. Additionally, automatic dependency management now resolves startup issues without manual intervention.

entries.headline: Improved Salesforce field management and record type handling
details: OpsPal now prevents invisible field additions when Dynamic Forms is active on your Salesforce pages
System Administrator profiles automatically receive proper permissions when creating new record types
Reduced session interruptions from routing conflicts

entries.headline: Fixed startup errors about missing packages
